Legal.privacyMetaDescription: How PROVIN.LV processes personal data, cookies, and analytics after consent under GDPR.
Legal.privacyLead: This document describes how PROVIN.LV ("we", "service") processes personal data, what cookies are used, and how you can accept or reject non-essential analytics and first-touch (UTM) data storage. Legal identity and controller details are stated at the start of this document.

sections.title: 1. Controller
sections.body: The data controller is PROVIN.LV; full legal details are provided at the start of this document. Contact: email and WhatsApp listed in the website footer.

sections.title: 2. What data we process
sections.body: Order data may include name (if provided), email, phone, VIN or license plate, listing URL (if provided), free-form message and payment metadata (processed by Stripe according to its policy). Technical server logs may be used for security and stability. The homepage may display curated public Google reviews (without extra tracking scripts for that block).

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: Contract performance and order processing (GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)); legitimate interests such as security and error prevention (Art. 6(1)(f)); analytics and UTM storage only after explicit consent via the cookie banner (Art. 6(1)(a)).

sections.title: 4. Cookies and essential functions
sections.body: Essential functions (e.g. language preference, session, security) may use cookies or similar technologies without separate consent where objectively necessary to provide the service.

sections.title: 5. Analytics and first-touch data (after consent)
sections.body: If you accept “analytics” in the cookie banner, we may store limited first-visit information: path, HTTP referrer (if available), and marketing parameters from the link (UTM). The goal is to understand where visitors come from (e.g. TikTok, YouTube, search), not to track individuals across all third-party platforms. This data is not sold.

sections.title: 6. Third parties
sections.body: Payments: Stripe. Hosting: e.g. Vercel. Vercel Web Analytics collects aggregated visit data for all visits. Google Analytics 4 and TikTok Pixel load only if you consent to analytics; if an ID is not configured, the related scripts are not loaded. Contact: email (footer) and WhatsApp (footer and floating button).

sections.title: 7. Retention
sections.body: Order and customer data are kept as long as needed for service delivery and legal requirements. Analytics/first-touch cookie lifetime is limited (typically up to 180 days) unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: 8. Your rights
sections.body: Under GDPR you may access, rectify, erase, restrict or object to processing, and request portability where applicable. Complaints may be filed with the supervisory authority (in Latvia — DVI).

sections.title: 9. Policy changes
sections.body: We may update this policy. Material changes will be indicated on the site or in the cookie banner if needed.

Legal.termsMetaDescription: PROVIN.LV terms: service scope, payment, refund policy, distance contract and digital content withdrawal terms.
Legal.termsLead: These terms govern the legal relationship between you and PROVIN.LV for use of provin.lv and ordering paid consultative report services (PROVIN MINI and PROVIN AUDIT).

termsSections.title: 1. Scope and acceptance
termsSections.body: By submitting an order and confirming these terms, the customer agrees to the full terms, the authorization in section 3.5 of the Latvian terms (where applicable), and immediate service execution.

termsSections.title: 2. Service nature
termsSections.body: PROVIN provides consultative digital reports: PROVIN MINI (€39.99) and PROVIN AUDIT (€99.99), as shown at checkout. Conclusions are advisory and do not replace an in-person technical inspection or a legal certificate.

termsSections.title: 3. Data sources
termsSections.body: PROVIN uses multiple lawful data sources, including paid international databases and public registries, according to applicable terms and law.

termsSections.title: 4. Public registries
termsSections.body: Public registry data is used only in lawful ways and according to applicable regulations.

termsSections.title: 5. Orders, pricing, payment and refunds
termsSections.body: Orders require VIN or license plate, email and phone; listing URL is optional but must be a valid listing link if provided. Pricing is shown at checkout (MINI €39.99 / AUDIT €99.99 as orientative current prices). Payment is processed by Stripe; refund rules for digital content are defined in section 11.

termsSections.title: 6. Delivery timelines
termsSections.body: The report is usually delivered within 48 hours after successful payment and complete order data.

termsSections.title: 7. Customer obligations
termsSections.body: Customers must provide accurate data (VIN or plate; valid listing URL if provided) and ensure they have rights to any provided third-party materials.

termsSections.title: 8. Intellectual property
termsSections.body: PROVIN report structure and content are protected; reuse is limited to personal use for purchase decision support.

termsSections.title: 9. Liability limitations
termsSections.body: PROVIN is not liable for incompleteness or errors in third-party data sources it does not control.

termsSections.title: 10. Personal data
termsSections.body: Personal data processing is governed by the Privacy Policy.

termsSections.title: 11. Digital content and withdrawal rights
termsSections.withdrawalIntro: **Withdrawal rights and refunds.** This section explains refund and withdrawal terms for digital content once service execution has started with user consent.

subsections.heading: 11.1. General rule
subsections.body: Withdrawal rights may apply under applicable law unless exceptions are triggered.

subsections.heading: 11.2. Digital content exception
subsections.body: By explicitly consenting to immediate execution and acknowledging withdrawal waiver, the customer loses withdrawal rights for digital content as allowed by Cabinet Regulation No. 255 (22.13) and applicable consumer law.

subsections.heading: 11.3. Other consumer rights
subsections.body: Other consumer rights remain applicable under law.

termsSections.title: 12. Dispute resolution
termsSections.body: Disputes are first handled amicably; unresolved matters may be handled under Latvian jurisdiction rules.

termsSections.title: 13. Changes to terms
termsSections.body: PROVIN may update these terms; the version active at order time applies unless law requires otherwise.

termsSections.title: 14. Applicable law
termsSections.body: These terms are governed by Latvian and directly applicable EU law.

termsSections.title: 15. Contacts
termsSections.body: Questions about these terms: use the email or WhatsApp listed in the website footer.

Cookies.bannerText: We use required cookies for website operation. If you consent to analytics, we may also store anonymous first-touch and UTM data and load Google Analytics and/or TikTok Pixel (when configured) to understand traffic sources.
